task_completion.description: Create Slide 1 with the specified title and subtitle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a title slide containing the exact title 'Jezero Delta Front Traverse' and the subtitle 'Science Team Briefing'.

task_completion.description: Create Slide 2 with the title 'Science Objectives' and four text objectives.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a slide titled 'Science Objectives' containing a text box or list with four distinct points (extracted from the briefing notes).

task_completion.description: Create Slide 3 with the title 'Traverse Area Map' and an inserted image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a slide titled 'Traverse Area Map' that contains an image (the Jezero map) taking up the main content area.

task_completion.description: Create Slide 4 with the title 'Primary Science Targets' and a 3-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a slide titled 'Primary Science Targets' containing a table or structured text with exactly three column headers: 'Sol', 'Site_Name', and 'Elevation'.

task_completion.description: Filter and include only High-Priority targets in the Slide 4 table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify the table on Slide 4 contains rows for 'Rochette', 'Brac', 'Quartier', and 'Artuby'. Ensure it does NOT contain distractor targets like 'Nav_Point_A' or 'Drive_Stop_45'.

task_completion.description: Save the presentation as traverse_briefing.pptx in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the presentation software's title bar for 'traverse_briefing.pptx' or check a file manager window showing this file inside the '~/Documents/Presentations/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI presentation application (like LibreOffice Impress) to create the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the interface of a presentation software being actively used to edit slides, rather than terminal commands generating the file via python/scripts.

integrity.description: The agent opened the source files to read the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing a text editor, spreadsheet viewer, or terminal output reading 'briefing_notes.txt' and 'waypoints_sol_300_320.csv'.

integrity.description: The table on Slide 4 is created as presentation elements, not just a pasted screenshot of the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a native table or formatted text boxes in the presentation software on Slide 4, rather than an image of a spreadsheet application pasted onto the slide.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/traverse_briefing.pptx. The table on Slide 4 must ONLY include the High Priority targets: Rochette, Brac, Quartier, and Artuby. It must EXCLUDE the distractor targets: Nav_Point_A, Drive_Stop_45, Hazcam_Check, UHF_Pass_Loc, Nav_Point_B, and Citadelle_Approach.
